description: Fragment of a letter of a cantor describing the visit of the Nagid in a town, probably Alexandria, during the holidays. The Nagid visited the synagogue of the Babylonians. 300 persons were present. Also lists prices of wheat and bread and reports that the oppressive measures had been slightly relaxed. (Information from Goitein notes and index card.)
description_he: שבר מכתב של חזן המתאר ביקור הנגיד בעיר (כנראה אלכסנדריה) בחגים; 300 אנשים נכחו; כולל מחירי חיטה ולחם ועדכון על הקלה בהגבלות
